<moleculizer-state>
  <model>
    <units-states>
      <modifications>
        <modification name="adp-bound">
          <weight-delta daltons="130"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="atp-bound">
          <weight-delta daltons="100"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="gdp-bound">
          <weight-delta daltons="99"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="gtp-bound">
          <weight-delta daltons="140"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="none">
          <weight-delta daltons="0"/>
        </modification>
        <modification name="phosphorylated">
          <weight-delta daltons="42"/>
        </modification>
      </modifications>
      <mols>
        <mod-mol name="Gpa1">
          <weight daltons="100"/>
          <binding-site name="to-Ste4">
            <default-shape-ref name="default"/>
            <site-shape name="GTP-bound-shape"/>
            <site-shape name="default"/>
          </binding-site>
          <mod-site name="gtp-mod-site">
            <default-mod-ref name="none"/>
          </mod-site>
          <allosteric-state>
            <mod-map>
              <mod-site-ref name="gtp-mod-site">
                <mod-ref name="gtp-bound"/>
              </mod-site-ref>
            </mod-map>
            <site-shape-map>
              <binding-site-ref name="to-Ste4">

              </binding-site-ref>
            </site-shape-map>

        </mod-mol>

        <tagged-substrate tag="0x8059c70" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x807dd08" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x807efe0" multiplicity="1"/>

      </tag-reaction>

    <volume liters="1e-12"/>
    <time seconds="3.9"/>
  </model>
  <streams>
    <tagged-species-streams>
      <tagged-species-stream name="ADP">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8059d94"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>

        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8059d24"/>
